mapper.select:
/* PpsSmsDumpMgmtMapper.getSmsDumpMgmtList */
SELECT MSG_TYPE, SCHEDULE_TIME, SUBJECT, ORGN_NM, SYSTEM_NM, SUM(CNT) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(MSG_TYPE,1,'SMS',2,'LMS',3,'MMS',6,'KAKAO') MSG_TYPE ,SUBSTR(SCHEDULE_TIME,0,8) SCHEDULE_TIME ,NVL((SELECT TEMPLATE_NM FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = DECODE(REGEXP_INSTR(RESERVED02,'^[0-9]+$'),1,RESERVED02,0)),DECODE(RESERVED02,'OTP',RESERVED02, '')) SUBJECT ,(SELECT FN_GET_ORGNM(MGMT_ORGN_ID) FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = DECODE(REGEXP_INSTR(RESERVED02,'^[0-9]+$'),1,RESERVED02,0)) ORGN_NM ,DECODE(RESERVED01,'MCP','고객포탈','CTI','고객센터','M전산') SYSTEM_NM ,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND (A.RESULT = '0' OR A.KKO_RESULT = '0') AND A.RESERVED03 <> 'SmsRsvSendSchedule' AND SCHEDULE_TIME BETWEEN #{searchStartDate} AND #{searchEndDate} GROUP BY MSG_TYPE,SUBSTR(SCHEDULE_TIME,0,8),RESERVED01,RESERVED02 UNION ALL SELECT DECODE(A.MSG_TYPE,1,'SMS',2,'LMS',3,'MMS',6,'KAKAO') MSG_TYPE , SUBSTR(SCHEDULE_TIME,0,8) SCHEDULE_TIME , B.SUBJECT , FN_GET_ORGNM(C.ORGN_ID) ORGN_NM , '대량문자발송' SYSTEM_NM , COUNT(*) CNT FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG A , MSG_SMS_LIST B , CMN_USR_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND (A.RESULT = '0' OR A.KKO_RESULT = '0') AND A.SCHEDULE_TIME BETWEEN #{searchStartDate} AND #{searchEndDate} AND A.RESERVED03 = 'SmsRsvSendSchedule' AND A.RESERVED02 = B.MSG_NO AND B.REGST_ID = C.USR_ID GROUP BY A.MSG_TYPE, SUBSTR(SCHEDULE_TIME,0,8), B.SUBJECT, C.ORGN_ID ) GROUP BY SCHEDULE_TIME, MSG_TYPE, SUBJECT, ORGN_NM, SYSTEM_NM ORDER BY SCHEDULE_TIME, MSG_TYPE, SUBJECT, ORGN_NM, SYSTEM_NM

SELECT MSG_TYPE, SCHEDULE_TIME, SUBJECT, ORGN_NM, SYSTEM_NM, SUM(CNT) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(MSG_TYPE,1,'SMS',2,'LMS',3,'MMS',6,'KAKAO') MSG_TYPE ,SUBSTR(SCHEDULE_TIME,0,8) SCHEDULE_TIME ,NVL((SELECT TEMPLATE_NM FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = DECODE(REGEXP_INSTR(RESERVED02,'^[0-9]+$'),1,RESERVED02,0)),DECODE(RESERVED02,'OTP',RESERVED02, '')) SUBJECT ,(SELECT FN_GET_ORGNM(MGMT_ORGN_ID) FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = DECODE(REGEXP_INSTR(RESERVED02,'^[0-9]+$'),1,RESERVED02,0)) ORGN_NM ,DECODE(RESERVED01,'MCP','고객포탈','CTI','고객센터','M전산') SYSTEM_NM ,COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND (A.RESULT = '0' OR A.KKO_RESULT = '0') AND A.RESERVED03 <> 'SmsRsvSendSchedule' AND SCHEDULE_TIME BETWEEN #{searchStartDate} AND #{searchEndDate} GROUP BY MSG_TYPE,SUBSTR(SCHEDULE_TIME,0,8),RESERVED01,RESERVED02 UNION ALL SELECT DECODE(A.MSG_TYPE,1,'SMS',2,'LMS',3,'MMS',6,'KAKAO') MSG_TYPE , SUBSTR(SCHEDULE_TIME,0,8) SCHEDULE_TIME , B.SUBJECT , FN_GET_ORGNM(C.ORGN_ID) ORGN_NM , '대량문자발송' SYSTEM_NM , COUNT(*) CNT FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG A , MSG_SMS_LIST B , CMN_USR_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND (A.RESULT = '0' OR A.KKO_RESULT = '0') AND A.SCHEDULE_TIME BETWEEN #{searchStartDate} AND #{searchEndDate} AND A.RESERVED03 = 'SmsRsvSendSchedule' AND A.RESERVED02 = B.MSG_NO AND B.REGST_ID = C.USR_ID GROUP BY A.MSG_TYPE, SUBSTR(SCHEDULE_TIME,0,8), B.SUBJECT, C.ORGN_ID ) GROUP BY SCHEDULE_TIME, MSG_TYPE, SUBJECT, ORGN_NM, SYSTEM_NM ORDER BY SCHEDULE_TIME, MSG_TYPE, SUBJECT, ORGN_NM, SYSTEM_NM
SELECT CALLING_NUMBER value, CALLING_NUMBER text FROM PPS_CODE_CALLING_NUM
SELECT SMS_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS mseq FROM DUAL
/* PpsSmsDumpMgmtMapper.getMmsFileList */ SELECT '/data/MMS/' || FILE_NM AS FILE_LOC ,ATT_ROUT ,FILE_NM FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ATT_SCTN = 'MMS'
